title: Seraphic PBR
description: PBR Texture Pack with LabPBR Support, Including AO, POM, Entity PBR and Emissive Entities.
body:
Seraphic PBR Texture Pack for Minecraft Java Edition

A texture pack for Minecraft Java Edition with PBR textures. Just so you know, this texture pack is currently under development.. To access the complete and regularly updated version, consider subscribing to my Patreon page. --- **Requirements:** - **[OptiFine]([https://optifine.net/home](https://optifine.net/home))** or **[Iris Shaders Mod](https://www.irisshaders.dev/)** (for shader compatibility) - A shader pack that supports PBR features, such as **[Nostalgia Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/nostalgia-shader)**, **[BSL Shaders]([https://bitslablab.com/bslshaders/](https://bitslablab.com/bslshaders/))**, or **[Kappa Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/kappa-shader/)**. - My Suggested shader Pack: **[Nostalgia Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/nostalgia-shader)** by [rre36](https://rre36.com/). --- **Terms and Conditions:** 1. **Distribution:** Redistribution, sharing, or reselling of the texture pack is strictly prohibited. **Users may modify the Seraphic PBR texture pack for personal use but are not allowed to redistribute or reupload any version.** --- Support the development of this pack and gain early access to updates by subscribing to my Patreon page. Enjoy the enhanced graphics and stay tuned for more updates! --- **socials:**
